title: Stats 110 — Harvard University
author: Joe Blitzstein
description: The gold standard for probability theory. Intensive lectures covering conditional probability, expectation, and distributions.

title: Fifty Challenging Problems in Probability
author: Frederick Mosteller
description: Remarkable puzzles that appear frequently in quant interviews. Essential for building intuition.

title: Heard On The Street
author: Timothy Falcon Crack
description: Quantitative questions from Wall Street job interviews — logic, probability, finance, and statistics. A staple for quant interview prep.

title: A Practical Guide to Quant Finance Interviews
author: Xinfeng Zhou
description: The famous "Green Book". Covers brainteasers, calculus, linear algebra, probability, and stochastic processes. One of the most recommended quant interview books.

title: Cut The Knot
description: A massive repository of mathematical puzzles, proofs, and interactive demonstrations. Great for deepening mathematical intuition.

title: Udacity Statistics Course
description: A great starting point for understanding basic statistical concepts and data analysis.

title: FRM Part 1 — Book 2: Quantitative Analysis
description: Comprehensive coverage of probability, statistics, and regression for risk management.

title: Topics in Mathematics with Applications in Finance
author: MIT OCW
description: Advanced mathematical methods applied to financial models. Covers SDEs, PDEs, and numerical methods. Recommended for final-year students.

title: Interest Rate Models
author: Coursera
description: Learn the mathematical modeling of interest rates and the pricing of interest rate derivatives.

title: Zerodha Varsity
description: The best resource for Indian market fundamentals. Focus on modules: Introduction, Technical, and Fundamental Analysis.

title: Options, Futures, and Other Derivatives
author: John C. Hull
description: Known as the 'Bible for Derivatives'. Essential reading for anyone serious about quant finance.

title: QuantGuide
description: Practice platform with real quant interview questions from top firms. Covers probability, statistics, and mental math in an interview setting.

title: FRM Part 1 — Book 3: Financial Markets & Products
description: Deep dive into various financial instruments and the markets where they trade.

title: FRM Part 1 — Book 4: Valuations & Risk Modeling
description: Learn how to value financial instruments and model the risks associated with them.

title: Investopedia — Fundamental Analysis
description: Comprehensive guide to evaluating a security by measuring its intrinsic value.

title: The Concepts and Practice of Mathematical Finance
author: Mark Joshi
description: Provides a developer's perspective on quantitative finance, bridging the gap between theory and execution.

title: Machine Learning Specialization
author: Andrew Ng
description: The most famous ML course. Theory-intensive and foundational for all further learning.

title: IITG Summer Analytics Course
author: IIT Guwahati
description: A structured approach to data science and analytics. Focus on solving assignments in Jupyter notebooks.

title: Feature Engineering — A Comprehensive Guide
description: Learn the art and science of selecting and transforming raw data into features that better represent the underlying problem.

title: Ensemble Methods — Bagging, Boosting & Stacking
description: Overview of bagging, boosting, and stacking techniques to improve model performance.

title: LearnCpp.com
description: The definitive free online tutorial for learning modern C++. Covers everything from fundamentals to advanced topics like templates, RAII, and move semantics.

title: Python Syntax & Basics
description: Fast-paced overview of Python syntax. No need for a full course if you already know another language.

title: Python for Finance & Trading Algorithms
description: Practical implementation of trading strategies and financial libraries in Python.

title: LeetCode
description: The standard platform for practicing Data Structures and Algorithms questions. Essential for all software roles.

title: InterviewBit Programming
description: Company-specific coding problems and interview preparation paths.

title: Topcoder Competitive Programming Tutorials
description: In-depth tutorials on complex algorithms and data structures from the best competitive programmers.

title: Operating Systems: Three Easy Pieces
author: Remzi H. Arpaci-Dusseau
description: A comprehensive and readable introduction to OS fundamentals: virtualization, concurrency, and persistence.

title: Computer Systems: A Programmer's Perspective
author: Bryant & O'Hallaron
description: Bridges the gap between hardware and software. Essential for understanding low-level computer behavior.

title: Grokking System Design
description: Learn how to design scalable and reliable large-scale distributed systems.

title: ETH Zurich Computer Architecture Lectures
author: ETH Zurich
description: Deep dive into modern computer architecture from one of the world's leading technical universities.

title: CppCon — Back to Basics Series
description: Essential series covering C++ fundamentals, from syntax to modern best practices.

title: Zetamac
description: The go-to speed arithmetic trainer used by traders and quants. Practice addition, subtraction, multiplication and division under time pressure. Aim for 60+ in 2 minutes.

title: MATIKS
description: A gamified mental math platform that makes speed arithmetic training fun and competitive. Great for building reflexes before quant interviews.

title: Art of Problem Solving — Mental Math
description: Collection of shortcuts and techniques for performing mental arithmetic quickly and accurately.

title: Brainstellar
comment: Must do! Many questions are directly asked from here in quant interviews.
description: Hand-picked probability and logic puzzles frequently asked in top quant firm interviews.

title: InterviewBit Puzzles
description: Detailed list of brainteasers curated by company and role.

title: Gurmeet Puzzles
description: A curated collection of classic and modern brainteasers — logic, math, and general reasoning.

title: Nigel Codwell — Quant Riddles
description: Challenging quantitative and logic-based riddles for interview prep.

title: IBM Research — Ponder This
description: High-level mathematical puzzles from IBM's research division. Published monthly.

title: Roadmap for Graduate Roles at Quant Trading Firms
author: Finance Club IITR
description: A strategic guide on how to break into the top-tier quantitative trading industry.

title: Projects to Get Started in Algorithmic Trading
author: Shreyas Sarda
description: Ideas and implementations for your first projects in algorithmic trading.

title: Getting Started with a Career in Algorithmic Trading
author: Shreyas Sarda
description: Comprehensive overview of the skills and path required for algorithmic trading.
